title: Senior exodus: meetings vs code
meta_description: Senior engineers quit big tech not because of pay but because of scaling friction — connection leaks, unobserved errors, and flaky staging cost teams 40% of their velocity. Measure your own stack with pgBouncer 1.21, Prometheus 2.47, and Node.js 20 LTS.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers don’t leave big tech because of salary.

They leave because their code unpredictably degrades under load.

https://kubaik.github.io/senior-exodus-meetings-vs-code

#Web3 #Tech #Technology #PostgreSQL

What would you add to this?
